title: U.S. counterterrorism director Joe Kent resigns over war: 'Iran posed no imminent threat'
summary_full: "Iran posed no imminent threat to our nation," Kent wrote in his letter to President Donald Trump.
summary_public: "Iran posed no imminent threat to our nation," Kent wrote in his letter to President Donald Trump.
